ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Raj Kumar Pun, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. At the request of Plaintiff, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 24, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
